features.description: SendMessage relays from other Claude sessions no longer carry user authority; permission requests refused.
features.reference_changelog_line: Hardened cross-session messaging: messages relayed via `SendMessage` from other Claude sessions no longer carry user authority — receivers refuse relayed permission requests, and auto mode blocks them

features.description: MAX_THINKING_TOKENS=0, --thinking disabled, and per-model toggle now disable thinking on default-thinking models.
features.reference_changelog_line: `MAX_THINKING_TOKENS=0`, `--thinking disabled`, and the per-model thinking toggle now disable thinking on models that think by default via the Claude API (3P providers unchanged)

features.description: Claude Code retries a turn once on the fallback model when API rejects an unexpected non-retryable error.
features.reference_changelog_line: Claude Code now retries a turn once on the fallback model when the API rejects an unexpected non-retryable error; auth, rate-limit, request-size, and transport errors still surface immediately

features.description: Managed settings with an invalid entry no longer silently disable enforcement of remaining valid policies.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed managed settings with an invalid entry silently disabling enforcement of their remaining valid policies

features.description: Managed-settings allowedMcpServers/deniedMcpServers predicates now match when using ${VAR} references.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed managed-settings `allowedMcpServers`/`deniedMcpServers` predicates not matching when they use `${VAR}` references

features.description: Glob pattern support in deny rule tool-name position; allow rules reject non-MCP globs; unknown deny names warn.
features.reference_changelog_line: Added glob pattern support in deny rule tool-name position (`"*"` denies all tools); allow rules reject non-MCP globs, and unknown tool names in deny rules warn at startup

features.description: New fallbackModel setting configures up to three fallback models; --fallback-model now applies to interactive sessions.
features.reference_changelog_line: Added `fallbackModel` setting to configure up to three fallback models tried in order when the primary model is overloaded or unavailable; `--fallback-model` now also applies to interactive sessions

features.description: claude update now announces the target version before downloading instead of going silent.
features.reference_changelog_line: `claude update` now announces the target version before downloading instead of going silent

features.description: claude agents list now filters to session whose first prompt contained a typed URL.
features.reference_changelog_line: `claude agents`: typing a URL into the list now filters to the session whose first prompt contained it
